title: Carpal tunnel in pregnancy and postpartum
excerpt: Numbness and wrist pain are common from fluid retention — posture tips and when to see a specialist.
content:
## Symptoms

Tingling, numbness, or pain in thumb–middle fingers, often worse at night. Pregnancy hormones and swelling compress the median nerve.

## Self-care

- Wrist splint at night if advised.
- Breaks from repetitive typing; ergonomic setup.
- Gentle stretches per physiotherapy guidance.

## Postpartum

Often improves as swelling resolves; persistent symptoms beyond a few months warrant specialist review.

## Seek care for

Hand weakness, muscle wasting, or sudden severe one-sided symptoms.
